ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot delicately holding a mooncake, emphasizing gentle movements and careful handling.  The robot will use both arms to cradle the imaginary mooncake in front of its body. The sequence will focus on the precision and care involved in handling a delicate object. Frame 1 will show the arms beginning to move towards the center, Frame 2 will show the arms meeting to cradle the mooncake, Frame 3 will show the mooncake being carefully lifted, and Frame 4 will show the mooncake being held in a stable and gentle position in front of the body.

frames.beat: arms extend gently forward, ready to receive
arms meet in the center, preparing to hold
hands cup the air, lifting the delicate treat
mooncake held carefully, a sweet offering
